Fast mode: ~2.5× speed, now far cheaper.

user effort control, cheaper Fast mode,

sources on demand — reports without a sprint.

You reach Claude through a surface → the model reasons → capabilities + Skills / Connectors / Plugins do the work → results land as Artifacts & files, all tuned by you.
